About Me

Strategy meets
creativity

I am Maurice Midoji Attiogbe — a Digital Marketer with hands-on experience spanning social media management, content creation, graphic design, and paid advertising, developed across multiple industries in Ghana.

I'm excited to partner with brands and teams who believe that great marketing starts with understanding people — not just platforms.

Career Timeline

Where I've
built my craft

2021 – 2022 Oraimo Ghana
Digital Marketer
  • Designed and managed the product quote content calendar series — pairing product imagery with relevant quotes to drive engagement.
  • Developed and implemented the FreePods 3 Giveaway Campaign to build brand loyalty and grow the community.
  • Researched, vetted, and engaged influencers for the Black Friday Sale to reach new audiences with a human touch.
  • Collaborated with the wider Oraimo Digital Marketers team across campaign ideation and execution.
2020 – 2021 J Bridge Bookstore
Social Media Manager
  • Created the Instagram and Twitter accounts from scratch — establishing brand voice, visual identity, and content strategy.
  • Grew the account to 1,000+ followers and achieved 10,000+ reach through targeted paid ads.
  • Designed all campaign flyers and promotional materials including Black Friday, Christmas, and Independence Day posts.
  • Launched the Friday 5 recurring series and reading engagement campaigns to boost community interaction.
Freelance LeBanzini Restaurant
Campaign Designer & Strategist
  • Conceived and designed the "Thunder Thursday" campaign identity — logo, brand mark, and full flyer suite.
  • Created seasonal promotional campaigns including Eid Al-Adha, Mother's Day, and Wednesday BOGO offers.
  • Established a consistent weekly brand touchpoint that created measurable buzz around key offer days.
Case Studies

Campaigns I've
led end-to-end

J Bridge Books · @jbridge_books
Building a Social Presence from Zero
Account Creation Paid Ads Content Design Community Growth
01
Brief
JBridge Books had no social media presence. The goal was to build brand awareness, grow a relevant audience, and drive book sales among parents and young readers in Ghana.
02
Strategy
Created Instagram and Twitter accounts, defined the brand voice, and built a content calendar mixing promotional posts, engagement content, and seasonal campaigns — all supported by targeted paid ads.
03
Execution
Designed and published all campaign materials in-house — Black Friday promos, Friday 5 weekly series, Christmas posts, reading engagement campaigns, and the Ghana Independence Day brand post.
04
Result
Grew the account to 1,084 followers with 154 posts, and achieved over 10,000+ reach across paid ad campaigns with top posts hitting 9.84K–12.1K reach individually.
1K+
Followers grown from zero
10K+
Audience reach via paid ads
154
Posts published
12.1K
Peak reach on single campaign
LeBanzini · @lebanzini
Thunder Thursday — Campaign Identity & Seasonal Suite
Brand Identity Graphic Design Campaign Strategy
01
Brief
LeBanzini needed a recurring weekly campaign to drive Thursday orders and build a distinct brand identity in a competitive Accra food market.
02
Strategy
Developed the "Thunder Thursday" concept — a high-energy weekly campaign anchored by a custom logo and consistent visual language across all promotional materials.
03
Execution
Designed the Thunder Thursday logo and a full seasonal campaign suite — Eid Al-Adha BOGO, Mother's Day Treat, Wednesday BOGO, and Free Delivery for first 10 orders.
04
Result
Established a consistent weekly brand touchpoint, created buzz through seasonal offers, and gave LeBanzini a distinctive visual campaign identity on social media.

Why Work With Me

What I bring
to every project

🏦
Banking Sector Context
Currently at Access Bank Ghana, I understand how financial brands communicate — balancing compliance, trust, and authentic engagement.
📊
Data-Informed Decisions
I track performance, report metrics, and refine strategy. Not just content creation — but measuring what works and optimising for results.
🎯
End-to-End Execution
From concept development and content design to publishing, community management, and post-campaign reporting — I handle the full cycle.
✍️
Brand Voice Consistency
Skilled at translating complex brand messages into clear, compelling content that resonates with the right audience across every platform.
🤝
Influencer Relationships
Experienced in researching, vetting, briefing, and managing influencer partnerships that genuinely extend brand reach to new audiences.
🌍
Local Market Insight
Deep familiarity with Ghana's digital consumer landscape, mobile-first behaviour, and the cultural nuance needed for authentic brand engagement.
